user.title: Add Govee Device
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Govee device. The device must have LAN Control enabled in the Govee Home app.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Verify the IP is correct and LAN Control is enabled.
error.fetch_failed: Unable to fetch scene catalog for that SKU. Verify the SKU and your internet connection.
error.sku_required: Enter a SKU before fetching the scene catalog.

abort.no_devices_found: No Govee devices found on the network.

init.title: Configure Govee Device
init.description: Update device settings. To refresh scenes, provide or confirm the SKU and enable scene-catalog fetch for this save.
